12.title: API Reference
12.content:
API Reference DRAFT


.technical-documentation > h1 { display: none !important }


You can also view this document in the Swagger Editor.



API Reference v1
A probation integration service to share data between the Making a Recall Decision API and the Delius probation case management system.




  Servers
  
    
    
    dev

    
    https://make-recall-decisions-and-delius-dev.hmpps.service.justice.gov.uk
  
    
    preprod

    
    https://make-recall-decisions-and-delius-preprod.hmpps.service.justice.gov.uk
  
    
    prod

    
    https://make-recall-decisions-and-delius.hmpps.service.justice.gov.uk
  
  



/case-summary/{crn}/personal-details

get

  Personal details e.g. name, date of birth, address.




Parameters


ParameterInTypeRequiredDescription




crn
path
string
true
The CRN (case reference number)











Responses


StatusDescriptionSchema




200

if the case exists



{
  "personalDetails": {
    "name": {
      "forename": "string",
      "middleName": "string",
      "surname": "string"
    },
    "identifiers": {
      "pncNumber": "string",
      "croNumber": "string",
      "nomsNumber": "string",
      "bookingNumber": "string"
    },
    "dateOfBirth": "string",
    "gender": "Female",
    "ethnicity": "string",
    "primaryLanguage": "string"
  },
  "communityManager": {
    "staffCode": "N01A001",
    "name": {
      "forename": "string",
      "middleName": "string",
      "surname": "string"
    },
    "provider": {
      "code": "N01",
      "name": "London"
    },
    "team": {
      "code": "N01T01",
      "name": "Recall team",
      "localAdminUnit": "North London",
      "telephone": "0123456789",
      "email": "example@example.com"
    }
  },
  "mainAddress": {
    "buildingName": "string",
    "addressNumber": "string",
    "streetName": "string",
    "town": "string",
    "county": "string",
    "postcode": "string",
    "noFixedAbode": "boolean"
  }
}








404

if the case does not exist, has been soft-deleted, or merged

404

if the case does not exist, has been soft-deleted, or merged















/case-summary/{crn}/mappa-and-rosh-history

get

  Current MAPPA and historical RoSH registrations


  This is intended to populate the MAPPA (Multi-agency public protection arrangements) and RoSH (Risk of Serious Harm) widgets. Note that risk assessment information is generally held in OASys, and this endpoint only surfaces supplementary Delius registration/register details.




Parameters


ParameterInTypeRequiredDescription




crn
path
string
true
The CRN (case reference number)











Responses


StatusDescriptionSchema




200

if the case exists



{
  "personalDetails": {
    "name": {
      "forename": "string",
      "middleName": "string",
      "surname": "string"
    },
    "identifiers": {
      "pncNumber": "string",
      "croNumber": "string",
      "nomsNumber": "string",
      "bookingNumber": "string"
    },
    "dateOfBirth": "string",
    "gender": "Female",
    "ethnicity": "string",
    "primaryLanguage": "string"
  },
  "mappa": {
    "category": 2,
    "level": 3,
    "startDate": "string"
  },
  "roshHistory": [
    {
      "active": true,
      "level": "string",
      "notes": "string",
      "startDate": "string"
    }
  ]
}



MappaAndRoshHistory




404

if the case does not exist, has been soft-deleted, or merged















/case-summary/{crn}/contact-history

get

  Contact history


  Returns matching historical records from the Delius contact log, including linked documents, and a summary showing the total number of contacts on the case grouped by type.




Parameters


ParameterInTypeRequiredDescription




crn
path
string
true
The CRN (case reference number)






query
query
string
false
Search for contacts that contain the provided text


If we decide to get this information from the database, then this will be a simple substring match on the notes field. However, we could potentially switch to using the contact search service when it’s ready, which would improve the performance and quality of results.







from
query
string
false
Return only contacts that start after this date






to
query
string
false
Return only contacts that start before this date. If provided, this value must be on or before the current date.






type
query
array
false
Filter on contact type codes






includeSystemGenerated
query
boolean
false
Include (true) or exclude (false) any contact types that are system-generated











Responses


StatusDescriptionSchema




200

if the case exists



{
  "personalDetails": {
    "name": {
      "forename": "string",
      "middleName": "string",
      "surname": "string"
    },
    "identifiers": {
      "pncNumber": "string",
      "croNumber": "string",
      "nomsNumber": "string",
      "bookingNumber": "string"
    },
    "dateOfBirth": "string",
    "gender": "Female",
    "ethnicity": "string",
    "primaryLanguage": "string"
  },
  "contacts": [
    {
      "description": "Initial appointment at Durham office",
      "documents": [
        {
          "id": "number",
          "name": "string"
        }
      ],
      "enforcementAction": "Refer to manager",
      "notes": "Missed appointment with Joe Bloggs",
      "outcome": "Failed to attend",
      "sensitive": "boolean",
      "startDateTime": "string",
      "type": {
        "code": "COAI",
        "description": "Initial appointment in office"
      }
    }
  ],
  "summary": {
    "types": [
      {
        "code": "COAI",
        "description": "Initial appointment in office",
        "total": 1
      }
    ],
    "hits": 1,
    "total": 123
  }
}








404

if the case does not exist, has been soft-deleted, or merged















/document/{crn}/{id}

get

  Download document content




Parameters


ParameterInTypeRequiredDescription




crn
path
string
true
The CRN (case reference number)






id
path
string
true
The Delius document id











Responses


StatusDescriptionSchema




200

if the document exists and it belongs to the case










404

if the document does not exist















/case-summary/{crn}/licence-conditions

get

  Active events/convictions, with licence conditions


  Only returns active licence conditions that are associated to active events/convictions. Licence documents are not returned, as they appear to be unused in the MRD UI - https://github.com/search?q=repo%3Aministryofjustice%2Fmake-recall-decision-ui%20licenceDocuments&type=code.




Parameters


ParameterInTypeRequiredDescription




crn
path
string
true
The CRN (case reference number)











Responses


StatusDescriptionSchema




200

if the case exists



{
  "personalDetails": {
    "name": {
      "forename": "string",
      "middleName": "string",
      "surname": "string"
    },
    "identifiers": {
      "pncNumber": "string",
      "croNumber": "string",
      "nomsNumber": "string",
      "bookingNumber": "string"
    },
    "dateOfBirth": "string",
    "gender": "Female",
    "ethnicity": "string",
    "primaryLanguage": "string"
  },
  "activeConvictions": [
    {
      "number": 4,
      "description": "ORA Suspended Sentence Order",
      "length": 2,
      "lengthUnits": "Months",
      "mainOffence": "Burglary",
      "additionalOffences": [
        {
        }
      ],
      "isCustodial": "boolean",
      "custodialStatusCode": "B",
      "licenceExpiryDate": "string",
      "sentenceExpiryDate": "string",
      "licenceConditions": [
        {
          "mainCategory": "Freedom of movement",
          "subCategory": "Police escort",
          "notes": "string"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}








404

if the case does not exist, has been soft-deleted, or merged
